name: Bagel Thins, Lo Cal, Lo Salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a very sharp serrated knife, slice the bagels into very thin rounds.
2. Arrange the slices in a single layer on a baking sheet.
3. Brush each slice with melted margarine and sprinkle with oregano.
4. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
5. Let cool completely before storing in an airtight container for up to one week.
Per serving: 14 calories; 0.5 grams fat; 0 cholesterol; 15 milligrams salt.
